data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: All acceptance criteria verified. (1) bash tests/test-doc-links.sh: 15/15 PASS. (2) [test_install_doc_contract] RED marker removed from .test-index. (3) bash tests/run-all.sh: pre-existing failures (compute-diff-hash, commit-tracker etc.) unrelated to this task. (4) ruff check: All checks passed. .test-index staged with marker removal.
